class.description: Find the start and end indices of the longest strictly increasing contiguous subarray of a given integer array.
class.statementTemplate: Given an array of integers, find the longest strictly increasing contiguous subarray. If there are multiple subarrays of the same maximum length, return the one with the smallest starting index. Input: {{seed}}. Implement `def solve(arr):` that returns a list `[start_index, end_index]` (0-based, inclusive) representing the longest strictly increasing contiguous subarray.
class.validatorDescription: Array of 1 to 50 integers, each between -1000 and 1000 inclusive.

gateResults.name: validator-round-trip
gateResults.detail: reference passes checker on all 5 examples
